task.title: Make workflow deterministic failures repairable by agents

events.content: Repair deterministic gates inside the workflow runner: Repair deterministic gates inside the workflow runner

raw.question: Repair deterministic gates inside the workflow runner
raw.chosen: Repair deterministic gates inside the workflow runner
raw.reasoning: Deterministic check failures should be treated as work for an existing workflow agent before becoming terminal workflow failures; this keeps workflows closer to a multi-agent prompt loop.

retrospective.summary: Added bounded deterministic gate repair: failed shell or verification gates select a repair agent, pass command/error/output context, run a repair task, and retry the gate. Added config fields, schema/docs, and a workflow-runner regression test.
